trade_permission_note: Phase7 判断当日买点环境允许交易。

selection_policy.pattern_filter: pattern hits ignore phase1/phase2 floors; require phase4_score_100 > 70 and same-day return <= 9.9%
selection_policy.phase8_policy: display-only; append Phase8 Top5 as extra candidates/source tags when prediction file exists
selection_policy.phase7_no_trade_policy: block highest-risk 20% trade days based on trained threshold
selection_policy.limit_up_filter: exclude both pattern and phase4_top candidates with same-day return > 9.9% before watchlist selection
selection_policy.position_size_formula: D = 2 * ATR14; effective average stop distance before third add = 0.85D; total planned position = min(40%, 2% / (0.85 * 2 * ATR14 / close))
